constraints.coverage_assumption: User confirmed the three proposed comparison axes (architecture role, directionality, training objective) for a Transformer vs BERT comparison.

task.object: original Transformer vs BERT across architecture role, directionality, and training objective

normalized_question: Compare the original Transformer ("Attention Is All You Need", 2017) with BERT (2018) along three axes: architecture role, directionality (attention masking/contextualization), and training objective. The user has confirmed these three comparison axes.

obligations.description: Determine attention is all you need 2017 architecture role for attention_is_all_you_need_2017 from source evidence.
Determine bert 2018 architecture role for bert_2018 from source evidence.
Determine attention is all you need 2017 directionality for attention_is_all_you_need_2017 from source evidence.
Determine bert 2018 directionality for bert_2018 from source evidence.
Determine attention is all you need 2017 training objective for attention_is_all_you_need_2017 from source evidence.
Determine bert 2018 training objective for bert_2018 from source evidence.
